Text: You reach in and catch your hand on the splintered wood. Lose 1 HP. It is empty.
There is a smell of tea in the chest but nothing more.
There is a small empty casket in the bottom.
At the bottom is a small bag of tea leaves, a carved horn cup and an acorn.
There is a scrunched up cloak worth 3D6 SC at the bottom of the box. Underneath it is a throwing axe.
The box is full of wood shavings, but beneath this are some random metal items roll MIT1 and MIT2.
Some rubbish has been thrown into the box. In it you find some leather cord and some black feathers.
There are 2 twisted metal bars at the bottom and a pouch of seed next to a Lock Pick +1(3).
There is a ruined pack at the bottom of the box. When you look inside you find a throwing dart and a potion. Roll on POT2.
Wrapped in some paper at the bottom of the box is a dead crow. Around its leg is an ornate gold ring worth D6 GC.
